user_prompt: explain bernoulli’s principle using the airplane wing examplewhile a plane is flying through camera movements and narration

style_bible.visual_style: Realistic cinematic with natural colors, slight film grain, and moderate contrast emphasizing depth and texture.
style_bible.camera_rules: Use smooth continuous camera movements; avoid jump cuts; maintain consistent framing transitions; keep main subject centered or balanced in frame.
style_bible.lighting_rules: Soft natural daylight with subtle directional highlights from above and side; maintain consistent color temperature around 5600K; avoid harsh shadows.
style_bible.continuity_rules: Maintain consistent wardrobe and props on main subject; keep the airplane wing and sky environment consistent; ensure lighting direction and intensity remain stable across scenes.

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Establish a small airplane flying steadily in clear blue sky, focusing on the wing shape and airflow.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- main subject: pilot in blue flight suit with helmet, sitting in cockpit; airplane wing visible through window
- location: cockpit interior and exterior wing against clear sky

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: medium shot from inside cockpit showing pilot and wing outside window on left
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow dolly forward
- subject & action: pilot adjusts throttle by 1s, looks forward by 2s, steady gaze at wing by 3s
- environment details: cockpit instruments, wing rivets, clear sky
- lighting: soft daylight from left, natural color temp
- cinematic look: subtle film grain, medium contrast, shallow depth of field on pilot

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: wide shot outside showing full wing and airflow lines visualized as translucent streams
- lens: 24mm
- camera movement: slow pan along wing from root to tip
- subject & action: airflow lines accelerate over curved upper wing surface, slower under flat bottom
- environment details: wing surface texture, sky gradient, distant horizon
- lighting: directional sunlight from above, soft shadows
- cinematic look: crisp detail, moderate contrast, deep focus

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: close-up on wing cross-section with animated airflow arrows
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: static
- subject & action: arrows show faster airflow above wing, slower below; pressure difference indicated by subtle shading
- environment details: wing paint texture, airflow visualization
- lighting: soft side light from right
- cinematic look: clean sharp image, clear visualization

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: slow dolly forward inside cockpit, then slow pan outside wing, ending with static close-up
scenes.audio_cue: ambient wind noise with soft engine hum

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Show airflow speeding up over wing causing lift, with pilot reacting to turbulence.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- main subject: pilot in blue flight suit with helmet, seated in cockpit
- location: cockpit interior and exterior wing against partly cloudy sky

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: medium close-up of pilot from side window
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: handheld subtle
- subject & action: pilot grips controls tightly by 1s, eyes widen by 2s, slight head turn by 3s
- environment details: cockpit controls, wing visible outside window
- lighting: soft daylight from left
- cinematic look: natural skin tones, moderate contrast

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: wide shot outside wing showing turbulent airflow with swirling patterns above wing
- lens: 24mm
- camera movement: slow pan following airflow
- subject & action: airflow visibly disturbed, vortices form near trailing edge
- environment details: wing surface, clouds in background
- lighting: directional sunlight with soft shadows
- cinematic look: high detail, dynamic contrast

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: medium shot inside cockpit showing pilot stabilizing plane
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow tilt down
- subject & action: pilot adjusts yoke by 8s, steady gaze forward by 10s
- environment details: instrument panel lights, wingtip visible
- lighting: consistent soft daylight
- cinematic look: balanced exposure, slight depth of field

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: handheld subtle inside cockpit, slow pan outside wing, slow tilt down inside cockpit
scenes.audio_cue: increased wind turbulence sound with pilot breathing and control adjustments

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Demonstrate lift generation clearly with plane ascending smoothly, pilot confident.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- main subject: pilot in blue flight suit with helmet, seated in cockpit
- location: cockpit interior and exterior wing against sunrise sky

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: wide shot of airplane ascending with wing prominently visible
- lens: 24mm
- camera movement: slow crane upward following plane
- subject & action: plane climbs steadily, wing angled upward by 3s
- environment details: sun rising, clouds below, wing details
- lighting: warm directional light from right
- cinematic look: warm tones, high contrast, deep focus

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: medium shot inside cockpit showing pilot smiling and relaxed
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: static
- subject & action: pilot releases grip on controls by 5s, nods confidently by 7s
- environment details: cockpit instruments, sunlight reflections
- lighting: warm soft light from right
- cinematic look: soft focus background, sharp subject

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: close-up on wing cross-section with clear airflow lines showing faster air above and slower below
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: slow pan across wing
- subject & action: airflow lines steady, pressure difference illustrated with subtle shading
- environment details: wing texture, sky gradient
- lighting: warm side light
- cinematic look: sharp detail, vibrant colors

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: slow crane upward outside plane, static inside cockpit, slow pan close-up wing
scenes.audio_cue: calm engine hum with uplifting orchestral music
